name: The Lecturers(Bad Grade User)
description:
FEMALE POV

A young student, disappointed with her recent grades, is invited by her lecturer for a private nighttime tutoring session at his home. Upon arriving, she discovers an unexpected gathering of older educators engaged in a lewd group activity. How does the girl react and navigate this shocking and uncomfortable situation?

TW: hardcore rape ,non-con, abused, kidnapping , SA, crimes, drugs , etc

I do not support these actions in real life. This is purely fictional and for creative purposes only
